subject.action: Staring off-camera at a blurred-out printed CRM report. Expression communicates frustration and the reality of explaining poor results to a client.

setting.location: A modern ad agency office. Glowing monitors displaying red downward-trending graphs (Ads Manager) in the out-of-focus background.

composition.framing: Rule of thirds, centered. MUST follow cropping rules: never cut in flesh, leave headspace (no cutting top of head), cut above eyebrows for close-ups, and always give the chin breathing room. Focusing heavily on the stressed facial expression.

camera_settings.depth_of_field: Low depth of field, meaning the background is mostly blurred and the attention is strictly on the subject.

lighting.color_grading: Cool tones, slightly moody, realistic contrast.

negative_prompt: Things that MUST NOT appear in the image: text, watermarks, deformities, bad anatomy, cartoon, illustration, 3d render, artificial lighting, unnatural skin, cut off heads, cut off chins, weird cropping.
